Dove Cameron released 'Taste of You' as a solo artist; there was no collaborator listed in Wikidata.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?collaborator WHERE {
  ?song wdt:P1476 "Taste of You" @en ; wdt:P175 ?collaborator .
  FILTER(?collaborator != wd:Q13560423)
}
```
